project.name: Bearly AI Chatbot
project.description: AI Chatbot with token usage tracking, chat history, daily limits, and multiple AI models

features.name: Authentication
tests: user can sign in with Google
user can sign out
authenticated user sees email in sidebar

features.name: Chat Functionality
tests: user can send a message
AI response appears after user message
streaming response displays correctly
response text is not garbled or corrupted

features.name: Token Usage Tracking
tests: token usage displays in header
token count increases after chat
token usage updates in real-time

features.name: Daily Limit Enforcement
tests: limit warning appears when tokens exhausted
input field disables when limit exceeded
user cannot send messages when limit reached

features.name: Chat History
tests: new chat appears in sidebar
clicking chat loads conversation history
multiple chats can coexist
chat title updates based on first message

features.name: Model Switching
tests: model dropdown displays all available models
user can switch between models
selected model persists across chats

features.name: Auto-Delete (5 Days)
tests: chats older than 5 days are deleted on load
deleted chats do not appear in sidebar
